title: baccharoides longepedunculata var. retusa
intro: Baccharoides longepedunculata var. retusa is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of flowering plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. Baccharoides longepedunculata var. retusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine for its purported therapeutic effects.
